questions.prompt: Avoid creating new table every bar?

choices.text: var table info = table.new(...) + update cells inside `if barstate.islast`. `var` declares once; islast updates only on last bar. Prevents performance + drawing-count issues.
str.tostring(close, "#.##") for fixed decimals. Or str.format("Price: {0}, RSI: {1}", price, rsi) for templates.

questions.explanation: str.tostring with format string; str.format for templates.
